ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the student */,
  "parental_education" TEXT /* Highest level of parental education attained */,
  "lunch_status" TEXT /* Type of lunch status (standard or free/reduced) */,
  "preparation_status" TEXT /* Status of any preparatory courses completed */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Student's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Student's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Student's zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student */,
  "math_score" INTEGER /* Score in math */,
  "reading_score" INTEGER /* Score in reading */,
  "writing_score" INTEGER /* Score in writing */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Calculated average score across subjects */,
  "standardized_test_score" INTEGER /* Standardized test score (e.g., SAT, ACT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance range */,
  "range_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance range (e.g., Good, Excellent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the criteria for the performance range */,
  "lower_bound" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the performance range */,
  "upper_bound" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the performance range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status (e.g., Present, Absent, Late) */,
  "tardy_status" TEXT /* Tardy status (e.g., Tardy, Not Tardy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits awarded for the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., introductory, advanced) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (e.g., course IDs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date when the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject taught by the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the teacher */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teacher_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment record */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teacher */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the teacher was assigned to the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teacher_assignments_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the assessment took place */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the assessment in the overall grade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assessments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the assessment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score obtained in the assessment */,
  "passing_status" TEXT /* Passing status (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teacher */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the student */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log was created */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES teachers ("teacher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade record */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the enrollment */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade in the course */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date when the grade was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)
